title: NanoComp/meep: python/examples/cylinder_cross_section.py
code_snippet:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

import meep as mp

r = 0.7  # radius of cylinder
h = 2.3  # height of cylinder

wvl_min = 2 * np.pi * r / 10
wvl_max = 2 * np.pi * r / 2

frq_min = 1 / wvl_max
frq_max = 1 / wvl_min
frq_cen = 0.5 * (frq_min + frq_max)
dfrq = frq_max - frq_min
nfrq
